artefacts.name: Data Processing Register
artefacts.content_summary: Register of all personal data processing activities, including purposes, legal bases, data categories, recipients, retention periods, and security measures.

artefacts.name: Privacy Policy (Public-Facing)
artefacts.content_summary: Published privacy policy available on the organisation's website, covering data subjects' rights, data processing purposes, and contact details for the DPO.

artefacts.name: Encryption Status Report
artefacts.content_summary: Report on encryption implementation: AES-256 for data at rest, TLS 1.3 for data in transit. 85% of databases encrypted; customer billing database pending encryption upgrade.

notes: Synthetic evidence. Encryption gap in billing database represents a deliberate partial-compliance scenario.
